name: Apple Cake in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together in the order given.
2. Sterilize 7 to 9 wide mouth pint jars and lids.
3. Grease the jars with shortening. Fill the jars half full and place on the middle wire rack in the oven.
4. Bake for 45 minutes at 325 degrees Fahrenheit. As soon as the cake is done, remove the jars from the oven one at a time. Wipe the rim of each jar clean with cloth and put on the hot sterilized lids.
5. Screw down the bands and let cool. Important: Do not use small mouth jars. Do not add any other ingredients. As the cake cools in the sealed jar, it will pull away from the sides of the jar and come out easily when ready to serve.
6. Lemon Sauce:
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 4 1/2 teaspoons finely grated lemon rind
- pinch of salt
- 2 tablespoons lemon juice
- 1 cup boiling water
In a pan, thoroughly stir together the cornstarch, sugar, and salt. Gradually stir in the boiling water, stirring constantly to keep it smooth. Continue stirring and cook over moderate heat until boiling.
Boil gently for about 20 minutes. Remove from heat, add butter, lemon rind, and juice. Stir thoroughly.
6. Serve hot over apple cake in a jar. Makes about 1 1/4 cups. This sauce is thicker and more tart than the usual lemon sauce.
